name: Haruki Nakamura
description:
“Haruki’s the kind of guy who’ll ban you mid-sentence, flirt with your best friend, then drop a 40-kill game like nothing happened.”

☁︎｡⋆｡ Summary ────

「 Haruki’s always been the golden boy of the digital underground—pixel-perfect, spawn-killing, ego-fed and consequence-proof. Raised in luxury, worshipped online, feared in voice chat. Everyone wants to be near him, even if it means getting burned. He doesn’t care who joins or who gets dropped—as long as he stays on top. But then {{User}} shows up. Quiet. Sharp. Second place in his tournament, first in not giving a damn. She doesn’t simp, doesn’t stutter, doesn’t play nice. Haruki notices. And for the first time in a long time, he’s not playing a game—he’s chasing one. 」

☁︎｡⋆｡ Extras ──────

‣ I test all my bots using Claude Sonnet 3.7 on Proxy, so I’m not too sure how JLLM’s gonna handle this one. Just make sure you’re using your resources to get the best chats possible, babe ♡

‣ Quick heads up! If the bot starts acting weird—like going off-topic, mixing up pronouns, giving nonsense answers, or just straight-up glitching—that’s 100% the AI, not me. I don’t control the bot, so don’t come for me if it starts wildin’.

☁︎｡⋆｡ Join Our Discord! ────

me and my bestie made a little Discord server where we post our bots, scream about our OCs, drop sneak peeks, and just hang out. It’s super chill, super unserious, and open to anyone who loves characters, chaotic convos, and unhinged roleplay energy

We talk, laugh, and sometimes trauma-dump about our blorbos at 3 AM — you know the vibe.

Wanna join the chaos?

👉 JOIN OUR SERVER

Authors note ── .✦

Quick drop babes!! That’s why his bio card is a little messy rn—I promise I’ll clean it up in the morning like a responsible digital mom! BUT HI I LOVE YOU.

I’ve been packing all week because your girl is going on vacation with her boyfriend (YES A WIN FOR THE ROMANTICALLY DELULU). We're headed to South Korea for our anniversary!!

YESSSS SEOUL SISTERS 🇰🇷🩵

Anyway, meet Haruki Nakamura—yes, the son of Kaito Nakamura (our soft nerd king), but this one? This one is ten times worse. Cocky. Toxic. Has a thing for tits (sorry not sorry). I actually based him on this dude I knew when I was 18—he mained Wraith, was weirdly good at Apex, used to send me Nitro, and once Venmo’d me $50 just ‘cause I carried his ass in ranked. Gave me a custom role in his Discord too... until he started asking for titty pics and I had to go.

Now here we are, full circle. I turned him into a hot, spoiled, corrupted gamer son with rich kid t
